Hello Karina, this is Robert Pierce from Falcon Aviation. It was a pleasure to meet you at the fair last week. I have your card here, and I would like to schedule a short meeting to talk about your aircraft. I am available next week, on Tuesday and on Wednesday. Tuesday is better for me, maybe at ten in the morning or at two in the afternoon. We can meet online, or at my office near the airport. Please check your calendar and reply to my email when you can. Let us confirm a day and a time soon. Thank you very much, Karina. I look forward to our meeting. Have a great day, and talk to you soon.

Hi Robert, this is Karina Macedo. Thank you for your message, and thank you for the kind words. I checked my calendar, and I am available on Tuesday. Ten in the morning is perfect for me. Let us meet online, because my office is far from the airport. I will send you a short email today to confirm the day and the time. I will also attach the price list for the aircraft, so we can talk about the numbers in the meeting. I am very happy to continue our conversation from the fair. Please reply if Tuesday changes. Thank you again, Robert. I look forward to speaking with you. Have a wonderful day.

First, Karina met Robert at the aviation fair and they exchanged cards. Then Robert sent her a message to schedule a meeting. Next, Karina checked her calendar and found a free day. After that, she replied to his email and confirmed Tuesday at ten. Finally, she attached the price list and they met online.
